node.statement: EXACT E2c (Two-body problem in LLL): Two particles with relative angular momentum m and CoM momentum M have UNIQUE state Psi_{mM}(z1,z2) = (z1-z2)^m * (z1+z2)^M * exp(-(|z1|^2+|z2|^2)/4). This is an exact eigenstate of ANY central potential V(|z1-z2|) in the LLL (neglecting LL mixing). Energy eigenvalue v_m = <mM|V|mM>/<mM|mM> is INDEPENDENT of M. This v_m is the m-th Haldane pseudopotential. For fermions m must be odd. [P11-Girvin eqs (1.81)-(1.82)]
